fields.name: General Rubric
fields.description: A general-purpose rubric for evaluating assignments.

fields.name: Content
fields.description: Evaluates the accuracy, relevance, and depth of the content.

fields.name: Organization
fields.description: Evaluates the logical structure and flow of the response.

fields.name: Expression
fields.description: Evaluates clarity, grammar, and overall quality of writing.

fields.name: Poor
fields.description: Content is largely inaccurate, irrelevant, or missing.

fields.name: Developing
fields.description: Content is partially accurate but lacks depth or relevance.

fields.name: Proficient
fields.description: Content is mostly accurate and relevant with adequate depth.

fields.name: Excellent
fields.description: Content is accurate, highly relevant, and demonstrates strong depth.

fields.name: Poor
fields.description: Response lacks clear structure and is difficult to follow.

fields.name: Developing
fields.description: Some structure is present but transitions and flow are inconsistent.

fields.name: Proficient
fields.description: Response is well-organized with clear transitions.

fields.name: Excellent
fields.description: Response is exceptionally well-structured and easy to follow.

fields.name: Poor
fields.description: Writing is unclear with frequent grammatical errors.

fields.name: Developing
fields.description: Writing is somewhat clear but has noticeable errors.

fields.name: Proficient
fields.description: Writing is clear and mostly free of grammatical errors.

fields.name: Excellent
fields.description: Writing is exceptionally clear, polished, and error-free.

fields.name: Outstanding
fields.description: Writing demonstrates exceptional style, precision, and sophistication.
